name_cn:
Premium
A stunning new FENDI backpack that captures your heart at first glance. Made of full cowhide with a super delicate texture, the drawstring design is simple yet high-quality. It holds a lot of capacity and is suitable for both commuting and outings, combining style and practicality.
Size 23/12/26cm
Style 8689
